description.ko: 유체 역학과 기하학적 패턴을 통해 음파를 시각적으로 탐구하며, 디지털 풍경 속에서 보이지 않는 음향 진동의 에너지를 포착합니다.
description.en: A visual exploration of sound waves through fluid dynamics and geometric patterns, capturing the unseen energy of acoustic vibrations in a digital landscape.

prompt: Abstract digital art of sound visualization, ECHO-0 aesthetic, intricate cymatic patterns, pulsing neon liquid gold and deep obsidian blue, 3D sound waves ripples in a vacuum, high-speed photography style, cinematic lighting, 8k, hyper-realistic textures
